summary: Comprehensive smoke test of all recent CRM changes. Backend: 12/12 tests passed including auth flows (login, create-user, forgot-password, reset-password), user management (profile update, password change), and orders (custom_fields at top level). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright and code inspection.
features_tested: Backend health: GET /api/config/boards returns board list - PASS (24 boards)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials - PASS (returns user without password_hash)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/login with wrong credentials - PASS (returns 401)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/create-user (admin) - PASS (creates email user)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/create-user duplicate email - PASS (returns 400)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - PASS (returns reset_link when RESEND_API_KEY empty)
Backend auth: POST /api/auth/reset-password valid token - PASS (resets password)
Backend users: PUT /api/users/{email}/profile - PASS (updates name)
Backend users: PUT /api/users/{email}/password - PASS (changes password)
Backend users: GET /api/users - PASS (excludes password_hash from all users)
Backend orders: POST /api/orders with custom_fields - PASS (merged at top level)
Backend orders: GET /api/orders - PASS (returns list)
Frontend landing page: Dual auth (Google + Email) - PASS (both buttons visible)
Frontend email login form: All elements - PASS (email, password, show/hide, forgot link)
Frontend /reset-password page: Renders correctly - PASS (password inputs, submit button)
Frontend FILTER_COLUMNS: Has 8 entries, NO cancel_date - PASS (verified in constants.js)
Frontend Dashboard: cancel_date excluded from date range filters - PASS (line 592)
Frontend Dashboard: 'Custom Date' label for created_at date range - PASS (line 595)
Frontend Dashboard: Group-by-date dropdown dynamic from columns - PASS (lines 634-650)
Frontend Dashboard: PO (order_number) column sticky with left-20 - PASS (lines 706, 727, 782)
Frontend InviteUsersModal: Tabs for Google invite and Email create - PASS (lines 182, 185)
Frontend InviteUsersModal: Email users show edit/change-pw buttons - PASS (lines 277-290)
critical_code_review_comments: All recent changes verified working correctly:
1. Dual Auth (Google + Email): Landing page shows both options, email form has all required fields
3. cancel_date excluded from FILTER_COLUMNS (8 entries without cancel_date)
4. cancel_date excluded from date range filters (excludeDateKeys includes 'cancel_date')
5. Date range filter for created_at labeled 'Custom Date'
6. PO (order_number/Orden) column has sticky classes (left-20) in header, body, footer
7. custom_fields merged at top level when creating orders (line 72-73 in orders.py)
8. Admin can edit profile and change password for email-type users via InviteUsersModal
9. GET /api/users excludes password_hash from all users
10. All backend auth endpoints properly validate inputs and return appropriate error codes

test_credentials.note: Test users created and cleaned up during pytest execution

seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iterations 46-49 are working correctly. Key implementations verified: (1) Dual auth with Google OAuth and Email/Password, (2) FILTER_COLUMNS has exactly 8 entries without cancel_date, (3) Date range filters exclude cancel_date, (4) created_at date range labeled 'Custom Date', (5) order_number column has sticky positioning (left-20), (6) custom_fields are merged to top level on order creation, (7) InviteUsersModal has tabs for Google invite vs Email create with edit/change-password buttons for email users. The mocked API is Resend email (RESEND_API_KEY empty) - reset_link returned in response when email would be sent.
